prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组最低位次约 2562→2810→2422→2469→2182，近 5 年呈波动中前移趋势，2025 年基准约 2182 名为近年最佳；2024–2025 年连续两年位次前移，累计前移约 287 名；该校在黑龙江省理科组计划 2021 年 46 人、2022 年 48 人、2023 年 51 人、2024 年 49 人、2025 年 49 人；2026 年计划增至 52 人，较 2025 年扩招约 6.1%，扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字倾向于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 13 名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第 11–13 名区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学，对高分考生持续具有强吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端事件），但抖音热度排名第 29/106（较热），短视频曝光量较高；2022–2023 年曾出现投档线异常信号，但 2025 年声誉已转为偏正面，整体报考关注度仍处中高水平；拥有 23 个 A- 及以上学科，其中工商管理 A+、生态学 A+、临床医学 A-、计算机科学与技术 A-、数学 A 等，学科实力雄厚，对理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐，临床医学推荐；黑龙江省 2026 年总考生约 16.7 万（较 2025 年 17.2 万略降约 3%），竞争略有缓解；中山大学位于广东广州，属华南地区顶尖高校，对东北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生规模约 70 人（文理合计），占比较小，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次前移至近年最佳、2026 年扩招约 6.1% 使竞争加剧、考生总数略降缓解竞争、声誉偏负面但抖音热度较高等因素，预测 2026 年理科组最低位次约 2282 名，区间 2008–2556 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制）
- 临床医学（广州）
- 网络空间安全（含鸿网创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能科学与技术
- 微电子科学与工程（珠海）
- 数学类（珠海）
- 航空航天类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类
- 环境科学与工程类（含永銮创新班）
- 机械工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2008–2556 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档临床医学八年制/网络空间安全作为冲刺、三档化学/环境类作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（2008 名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（2556 名附近）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 2562→2810→2422→2469→2182, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend over the past 5 years, with the 2025 baseline of about 2182 being the best in recent years; from 2024 to 2025, rankings moved forward for two consecutive years, with a cumulative forward movement of about 287 places; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Heilongjiang Province was 46 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 49 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 52, an expansion of about 6.1% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 13th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 11th–13th range in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving academic misconduct incidents), but Douyin popularity ranks 29th out of 106 (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; there were abnormal signals in admission cutoffs in 2022–2023, but by 2025 the reputation had turned slightly positive, with overall application attention still at a medium-high level; it has 23 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Ecology, A- in Clinical Medicine, A- in Computer Science and Technology, A in Mathematics, etc., with strong academic strength, attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other popular science majors continue to be highly recommended, along with Clinical Medicine; the total number of candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000 (slightly down about 3% from 172,000 in 2025), easing competition slightly; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a top university in South China, with some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Northeast China; the university's enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province is about 70 (combined arts and science), a relatively small proportion, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking moving forward to the best in recent years, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.1% intensifying competition, a slight decrease in total candidates easing competition, a slightly negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, etc., the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science group is about 2282, with a range of 2008–2556.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Guangzhou)
- Cyberspace Security (including Hongwang Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Zhuhai)
- Mathematics (Zhuhai)
- Aerospace Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chemistry
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Yongluan Innovation Class)
- Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2008–2556, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)/Cyberspace Security as a reach, and Tier 3 Chemistry/Environmental Science as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2008), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2556), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科组最低位次约 421→361→380→306→400，近 5 年波动较大，2024 年 306 名为近年最佳，2025 年回落至 400 名；近 3 年波动幅度约 94 名，整体呈震荡格局；该校在黑龙江省文科组计划 2021 年 20 人、2022 年 21 人、2023 年 18 人、2024 年 20 人、2025 年 20 人；2026 年计划降至 18 人，较 2025 年缩招 10%，缩招使竞争加剧，位次数字倾向于减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 13 名（Top20），近年排名稳定，对文科高分考生吸引力持续；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（学术不端事件），但抖音热度排名第 29/106（较热），整体报考关注度仍处中高水平；2025 年声誉已转为偏正面，未见明显断档信号；工商管理 A+、生态学 A+、中国语言文学 A、社会学 A-、法学 A-、外国语言文学 A- 等，文科相关学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学分化观望、汉语言/中文推荐、师范/教育分化观望、新闻传播明显劝退；黑龙江省 2026 年总考生约 16.7 万（较 2025 年略降约 3%），竞争略有缓解；中山大学位于广东广州，对东北文科考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省文科招生规模约 18–21 人，占比较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次回落至 400 名、2026 年缩招 10% 使竞争加剧（位次数字减小）、考生总数略降缓解竞争、声誉偏负面但抖音热度较高等因素，预测 2026 年文科组最低位次约 356 名，区间 313–399 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for the liberal arts group: approximately 421→361→380→306→400, with significant fluctuations over the past 5 years; 2024's rank of 306 was the best in recent years, while 2025 fell back to 400; the fluctuation range over the past 3 years is about 94 places, showing an oscillating pattern; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province: 20 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan drops to 18, a 10% reduction compared to 2025, intensifying competition and tending to lower the ranking number (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 13th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring liberal arts students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents), but Douyin popularity ranks 29th out of 106 (relatively hot), overall application attention remains at a medium-high level; the 2025 reputation has turned slightly positive, with no clear signs of a drop-off; Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Sociology A-, Law A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, etc., with outstanding strength in liberal arts-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law: wait-and-see differentiation; Chinese Language/Chinese: recommended; Teacher Training/Education: wait-and-see differentiation; Journalism and Communication: clearly discouraged; total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 167,000 (slightly down about 3% from 2025), easing competition slightly; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, with some cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts examinees in Northeast China; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province is about 18–21 students, a relatively small share.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking falling back to 400, the 10% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition (lowering the ranking number), a slight decrease in total examinees easing competition, a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and other factors, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group is approximately 356, with a range of 313–399.
